title: Breaking silos with agentic AI: How Google Cloud transforms enterprise data into real-time action
summary: Google Cloud Tech showcases FynanceAI, a platform demonstrating enterprise agentic AI that orchestrates data across Oracle databases, Looker BI, and vector stores. The system uses Google Cloud's Agent Development Kit and open source Model Context Protocol to enable autonomous task execution with security controls for mission-critical systems.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through FynanceAI, a platform that demonstrates enterprise agentic AI orchestrating data across Oracle databases, Looker BI, and vector stores. The video shows how Google Cloud's Agent Development Kit and the open source Model Context Protocol connect these silos to enable autonomous task execution, with security controls aimed at mission-critical systems. Key takeaways: agents coordinate across relational, BI, and vector data sources rather than a single store, MCP provides the open integration layer, and the setup pairs autonomous action with security guardrails.
